title: 10 health benefits of Ficus benghalensis (banyan)
intro: Ficus benghalensis has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can aid in treating various ailments. The plant's latex contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and combat microbial infections. These properties can be beneficial for people suffering from skin conditions like eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as those with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Regular use of banyan extracts or tea may also help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and improve overall immune function.
